overall.description: First-person exploration of a foggy swamp in Red Dead Redemption 2 during a heavy rainstorm. The player walks along the water's edge past a distinctive dead tree, through lush vegetation, toward a rocky stream area with a small waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: swamp shoreline with dead tree and lily pads

events.description: UI prompt appears indicating player can pick Common Bullrush plant

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the swamp edge examining the vegetation and water

entered.detail: tall leafless dead tree with twisted bare branches standing in the water
murky dark water with lily pads and reeds along the bank
dense green trees shrouded in fog and rain
large rock formation visible through the mist across the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy swamp shoreline in heavy rain, with a prominent dead tree on the right and murky water on the left. The dense forest canopy blocks most of the sky, and a UI prompt appears indicating an interactive plant can be picked.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lake shore with rocky cliffs and waterfowl

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoreline passing the dead tree and approaching waterfowl in the distance

notable_agents.action: flock of pink waterfowl wading and feeding in the shallow water

entered.detail: group of pink birds feeding in the shallow water near the opposite shore

segments.scene_description: The view opens up to reveal a wider lake with a rocky cliff face across the water. The dead tree falls behind as the camera moves forward, and a flock of pink waterfowl becomes visible wading in the shallows.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream inlet with flowing water and waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking into the rocky stream bed toward the flowing water and small waterfall

entered.detail: scattered stones and pebbles in the shallow stream bed
small cascade flowing down the rocky cliff face into the water

segments.scene_description: Approaching a rocky stream inlet with a small waterfall visible in the distance. The ground becomes rocky and uneven as the camera moves into the shallow water, leaving the forested shore and waterfowl behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched swamp that gradually opens from a dense forest into a rocky waterfront. It begins along a foggy shoreline under a heavy canopy, passing a prominent dead tree and murky waters while an interactive plant prompt appears. As the camera moves forward, the forest thins to reveal a wide lake with a rocky cliff face in the distance and a flock of pink waterfowl wading in the shallows. The scene then shifts toward a rocky stream inlet, leaving the waterfowl behind as the terrain becomes uneven and stony. Finally, the camera moves directly into the shallow water, advancing toward a small waterfall visible in the distance.
